phrases.intent_en: Ask where to register for bike rental
phrases.text_local: Onde posso inscrever-me para alugar bicicletas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo eensk-rih-VEHR-MIH PUH-ruh uh-loo-GAHR bee-seek-LEH-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bike rental registration is handled at designated tables for quick processing.

likely_response.local: Com o agente de informações turísticas.
likely_response.pronunciation: KOHM AW uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.

responses.phonetic: KOHM AW uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.
responses.local: Com o agente de informações turísticas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Fortaleza tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar ingressos para a Fortaleza?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR eeng-RIH-soosh PUH-ruh AH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Fortress tickets are sold at dedicated counters to manage visitor flow.

likely_response.local: Você pode comprar na bilheteria do forte ou online.
likely_response.pronunciation: voh-SEH PAW-dih koomp-RAHR NUH bee-lyih-tih-REEUH DOO FAW-ruh-tih OHW oong-LEE-nih.
likely_response.translation_en: You can buy at the fort ticket office or online.

responses.english: You can buy at the fort ticket office or online.
responses.phonetic: voh-SEH PAW-dih koomp-RAHR NUH bee-lyih-tih-REEUH DOO FAW-ruh-tih OHW oong-LEE-nih.
responses.local: Você pode comprar na bilheteria do forte ou online.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Fortaleza tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes para a Fortaleza da Bandeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh DUH bahnng-DAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The tourist office serves as the main ticket point for local attractions.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, you can buy them here.

responses.english: Good morning, you can buy them here.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get Costa Vicentina maps
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro os mapas da Costa Vicentina disponíveis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo OOSH MAH-puhsh DUH KAWSH-tuh vee-sayng-TEE-nuh deesh-poo-NEE-vaysh?
phrases.cultural_note: Trail maps are typically displayed on low shelves for easy public access.

likely_response.local: Os mapas estão disponíveis no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH MAH-puhsh ihsh-TOWN deesh-poo-NEE-vaysh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: The maps are available at the information desk.

responses.english: The maps are available at the information desk.
responses.phonetic: OOSH MAH-puhsh ihsh-TOWN deesh-poo-NEE-vaysh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Os mapas estão disponíveis no balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to book boat tours
phrases.text_local: Onde posso reservar passeios de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-zih-ruh-VAHR puh-SAYOOSH DIH BAH-ruh-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Color-coded signs are widely used in Portuguese venues to guide tourists efficiently.

likely_response.local: Fale com o agente de informações turísticas.
likely_response.pronunciation: FAH-lih KOHM AW uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Speak with the tourist information agent.

responses.english: Speak with the tourist information agent.
responses.phonetic: FAH-lih KOHM AW uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh.
responses.local: Fale com o agente de informações turísticas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy bus tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes de autocarro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh DIH ow-too-KAH-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese tourist offices often direct visitors to numbered windows for specific services.

likely_response.local: No quiosque da Rodoviária, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO KEEOHSH-kih DUH roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the bus ticket issuance window.

responses.english: Go to the bus ticket issuance window.
responses.phonetic: NOO KEEOHSH-kih DUH roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.local: No quiosque da Rodoviária, à esquerda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to register for bike rental
phrases.text_local: Onde faço o registo para alugar bicicletas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FAH-soo AW reh-ZHEESH-too PUH-ruh uh-loo-GAHR bee-seek-LEH-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bike rental registration is handled directly at the tourist office counter.

likely_response.translation_en: Go to the booking reservation clerk.

responses.english: Go to the booking reservation clerk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get walking route
phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter o roteiro a pé do centro histórico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR AW roo-TAY-roo AH PEH DOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Self-service stands are common for distributing walking maps in Portuguese towns.

likely_response.local: Na bilheteira ou no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket counter or the information desk.

responses.english: At the ticket counter or the information desk.
responses.phonetic: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Na bilheteira ou no balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to book boat tours
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde posso reservar passeios de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-zih-ruh-VAHR puh-SAYOOSH DIH BAH-ruh-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Boat tours to Ponta da Piedade's grottoes are very popular; booking in advance is recommended during peak season.

likely_response.local: No balcão de reservas, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH reh-ZEH-ruh-vuhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the booking counter, on the right.

responses.english: At the booking counter, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH reh-ZEH-ruh-vuhsh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: No balcão de reservas, à direita.
